'''Tark''' was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solem]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and part of a resistance movement against the planetary [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Malvander Bren]].
